description: C/C++ enum-constant and typedef-alias coverage + node-id addressability. Grounded on forgeql-pub.frozen (tests/fixtures/motor_control.h: two enums, an anonymous `typedef struct { ... } EstadoMotor_s;`, and a function-pointer `typedef void (*FnCallback)(void);`). Guards the fix that made enum constants and typedef aliases both indexable (real fql_kind) and addressable (node_id).

cases.name: enumerators_indexed
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'tests/fixtures/motor_control.h' WHERE fql_kind='enumerator' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 20

steps.fql: FIND symbols IN 'tests/fixtures/motor_control.h' WHERE fql_kind='enumerator' WHERE name='TIMEOUT' LIMIT 1

cases.name: anonymous_typedef_struct_alias_indexed
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'tests/fixtures/motor_control.h' WHERE fql_kind='type_alias' WHERE name='EstadoMotor_s' LIMIT 5

cases.name: function_pointer_typedef_alias_indexed
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'tests/fixtures/motor_control.h' WHERE fql_kind='type_alias' WHERE name='FnCallback' LIMIT 5

steps.fql: FIND symbols IN 'tests/fixtures/motor_control.h' WHERE fql_kind='type_alias' WHERE name='FnCallback' LIMIT 1
